---
title: "Educational Programs"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Immersive learning experiences for technology enthusiasts"
description: "Explore our educational programs including hackathons, summer schools, and specialized training events designed for hands-on learning and skill development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:60vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Programs</h1>
    <p>Hackathons, summer schools, and community meetups. Learn by building.</p>
    <a href="#programs" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Explore</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">9+</div><div class="m-nl">Years</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">500+</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">3</div><div class="m-nl">Countries</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">Free</div><div class="m-nl">Computer Club</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROGRAM CARDS -->
<div class="m-s" id="programs" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Our programs</h2>
    <p class="sub">Immersive experiences that go beyond traditional learning.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Hackathons">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <h3>Hackathons</h3>
              <p>48-hour challenges in cybersecurity, AI ethics, and space tech. Real problems, real teams.</p>
              <span class="m-lk">Explore hackathons</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Summer School">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <h3>Summer School</h3>
              <p>Multi-week intensive programs combining lectures, workshops, and project work.</p>
              <span class="m-lk">Discover summer school</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Computer Club">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <h3>Computer Club</h3>
              <p>Monthly meetups for coding, hacking, and building together. All levels welcome.</p>
              <span class="m-lk">Join the club</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Collaborative learning"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Learn faster<br>by building together.</h2>
        <p>Our programs put you in teams with peers and mentors, working on real challenges under real deadlines. It's the fastest way to build skills that stick — and a network that lasts.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-lk">See upcoming events</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING PROGRAMS — image cards -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Upcoming 2026</h2>
    <p class="sub">Register early — spots fill fast.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Computer Club"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>Monthly &middot; Craiova & Online</div><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Open discussion, hacking, and tech exploration. All levels.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="AI Ethics"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>March 5, 2026 &middot; Bucharest</div><h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3><p>48-hour challenge on ethical AI and responsible design.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Summer School"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>Aug 1–15, 2026 &middot; Craiova</div><h3>Summer School 2026</h3><p>Two weeks of cybersecurity, cloud, and AI.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="SpaceApps"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>October 2026 &middot; Craiova</div><h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3><p>NASA's global 48-hour hackathon. 9th edition.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/junior.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Junior"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>July 2026 &middot; Craiova</div><h3>Junior Summer School</h3><p>Technology summer school for ages 14-18.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BENEFITS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Why join a program</h2>
    <p class="sub">What you get from every chen.ist program.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Collaborative"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Collaborative</h3><p>Work alongside peers and experts to solve real problems together.</p></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Accelerated"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Accelerated</h3><p>Intensive formats that build practical skills in days, not months.</p></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Career"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Career-building</h3><p>Real projects for your portfolio and a network that opens doors.</p></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to join?</h2>
    <p>Browse programs or book a call to discuss custom events for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-b">See all events</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo">Book a consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
